purpose: Define the complete minimum project wizard configuration needed for Phase A without changing frontend runtime or activating backend integrations.

rules: canImport must remain false until Paula authorizes real import/runtime.
raw HR URLs must not be persisted in browser storage for production behavior.
sourceRef should be opaque when backend provides it.
externo_general requires a project-level URL before execution.
externo_visita requires a visit-level link field before execution.
external questionnaire without link must show warning and must not fall back to internal form.
submitido must be configurable by project and not hard-coded to TyA or Cinepolis.
liquidation eligibility must not be derived from questionnaire completed alone.
historical approved certifications must be preserved.
Gemini may prepare question banks only with human review before publication.
No integration may be shown as live unless backend authorization exists.
Make/Gemini/WhatsApp/Storage/Auth/Firestore must remain gates in this contract.

commercializablePrototypeNotes: Wizard must be generic SaaS multi-project, not hard-coded to TyA/Cinepolis.
Tenant/project visible labels may vary, but internal configuration keys should remain canonical.
The wizard should honestly show prepared/off/blocked integrations instead of live integrations.
Project creation should not create real backend resources from frontend-only wizard actions.
hardStops: Do not activate runtime from the wizard.
Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not import HR from this contract.
Do not call Make, Gemini, WhatsApp or Storage from this contract.
Do not hard-code TyA/Cinepolis as the only project model.
Do not store raw sensitive data or secrets in project configuration.
